name: Microwave Risotto Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1 cup asparagus tips, blanched and cooled
1 cup sugar snap peas, stems removed, blanched and cooled
1 cup spinach, rinsed, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4 as main course, 8 as side dish.
All heating is done at 100%, uncovered.
1. Heat butter and oil in a shallow casserole for 2 minutes.
2. Add leeks, salt, and pepper. Cook for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in rice and broth. Cook for 13 minutes.
4. Add wine, stir well, cook for 6 minutes.
5. Add carrots, cook for 6 minutes.
6. Taste for doneness. If rice is still hard, cook another couple of minutes.
7. Remove from microwave and add zucchini, asparagus, and sugar snap peas. Stir well.
8. Adjust seasoning. Let stand 5 minutes, stirring several times.
9. Beat in 3/4 cup ricotta cheese.
10. Add spinach. Serve topped with a dollop of ricotta and sprinkled with chives and parsley.
